title: The configurable KdV conservative update expands to a flux-difference update

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: The configurable KdV conservative update is exactly the old state minus scale times the local KdV flux difference.
assumptions: all scalar parameters are real numbers
u is a real-valued grid state on natural-number indices
n and i are natural-number grid or range indices as used in the theorem statement
the KdV scaffold definitions are those in LeanNumerics.FiniteDifference.Kdv
informal.expected_conclusion: The KdV update unfolds to the conservative flux-difference form.

declarations.name: kdvConservativeUpdate_eq
declarations.statement: theorem kdvConservativeUpdate_eq (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i = u i - scale * fluxDifference (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u) i

tasks.input: Translate this KdV conservative scaffold theorem into Lean 4: The configurable KdV conservative update is exactly the old state minus scale times the local KdV flux difference.
tasks.target: theorem kdvConservativeUpdate_eq (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i = u i - scale * fluxDifference (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u) i

tasks.input: Given the KdV scaffold definitions and referenced conservation lemmas, complete the Lean 4 proof.
tasks.target: A proof by reflexive unfolding of kdvConservativeUpdate and conservativeUpdate.
